Read The Series

Books

Sacred Peaks Ranch Book 1

Finding Her Home

She's the ranch hand who doesn't fit the mold. She's the city girl looking for something real. Together, they'll discover that home isn't a place, it's a person.

Buy Now Learn More

Sacred Peaks Ranch Book 2

Stirring Her Soul

She finds peace in perfect stillness. She creates magic from beautiful chaos. Together, they'll discover that the most powerful alchemy happens when opposites become partners.

Buy Now Learn More

Sacred Peaks Ranch Book 3

Healing Her Heart

Dr. Emily McDonald, a science-focused veterinarian, and Alex Rivera, an intuitive equine therapist, are forced to work together on a challenging case involving horses. Despite their different approaches, they develop undeniable chemistry while working in the Colorado mountains. As they collaborate on healing work, they fall for each other, discovering that combining scientific precision with traditional wisdom creates powerful results. Includes a bonus holiday epilogue, "Unwrapped," featuring characters from Book 1.

Buy Now Learn More

Sacred Peaks Ranch Book 4

Lighting Her Fire

A guarded firefighter. A fiery archaeologist. One cabin, one bed, and all the heat.

Buy Now Learn More

Sacred Peaks Ranch Book 5

Drawing Her Close

She drove eleven hundred miles to be left alone. The woman with the wrench had other plans.

Buy Now Learn More

Sacred Peaks Ranch Book 6

Singing Her Name

Rae Linnet, a Grammy-winning musician struggling with insomnia and stalker threats, accepts shelter from Kim Yazzie, a small-town deputy. Kim, responsible and weary from helping her sister with childcare, opens her home. Within days, Rae settles into domestic life with Kim's six-year-old daughter Joy, leading to an unexpected connection across forced proximity and shared space.

Buy Now Learn More

Sacred Peaks Ranch: A Short Story Collection

Wide Open Valley

Seven stories. One valley. Many kinds of love.

Buy Now Learn More
